long_description:
Affected support: On-Site Personnel Coverage / DCOPS Supported Services
Location: LON06
Please note the LON06 Data Center will be unstaffed between the hours of 20:00 07/12/2025 - 08:00 08/12/2025. During this time we will not be able to respond to on-site requests and/or troubleshooting. In the event of potential power or cooling events identified through monitoring, or SEV1 & SEV2 customer-related tickets and cases please use the Data Center escalation points per https://confluence.softlayer.local/display/DCOps/DCO+Emergency+Contact+List
short_description: Onsite Resource Availability - Team Coverage Unavailable (Night) - LON06
close_notes:
Incident cancelled by j.oswald@ibm.com. 

Reason: Not required
